# Amphibian Labs
> AI backends, system integration, and workflow automation for SMBs

## About
Amphibian Labs is an Australian tech consultancy that enhances existing business systems with AI-powered backend services, workflow automation, and system integration. Founded by Pierre Montanov.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://amphibianlabs.com.au/)
- [Services](https://amphibianlabs.com.au/services)
- [Open Source](https://amphibianlabs.com.au/repositories)
- [Blog](https://amphibianlabs.com.au/blog)
- [Contact](https://amphibianlabs.com.au/#contact)

## Flagship project
- [DocIQ](https://github.com/pierremontanov/HealthParse) - Open-source AI document intelligence engine for healthcare. MIT licensed. 1,100+ tests.
